name: Progress dashboard

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a snapshot of completion and health across multiple projects, goals, or local-tool tasks, such as delivery progress, migration checklists, test coverage, and batch status; use milestone-tracker when the focus is milestones over time, or a chart to explore many time series.
en.why_valuable: AI often substitutes a row of percentage text for real progress visuals, and status easily drifts from the numbers; this template unifies bar/ring progress, raw values, display values, and on-track/risk/blocked status in a responsive card grid.

data_in.note: data.items is an array of progress metrics. value and max calculate visual progress, clamped to 0-100%; max defaults to 100 when omitted or nonpositive. display overrides only the visible large number, not the calculation. kind is 'bar' or 'ring', default bar; status is 'on-track', 'done', 'at-risk', or 'blocked', with unknown values treated as on-track.

schema.title?: string -- dashboard title; displays "Progress dashboard" when omitted
schema.summary?: string -- statistical summary to the right of the title; displays the metric count when omitted
schema.items: {label:string,value:number,max?:number,display?:string,kind?:'bar'|'ring',status?:'on-track'|'done'|'at-risk'|'blocked',detail?:string}[] -- progress cards; label is the name, value/max determine the ratio, display is formatted output, and detail is a short description

spec.note: Height grows with the card count; the card grid has a minimum column width of 235px and becomes one column below 520px. No vh/percentage height and no ResizeObserver dependency.

when_to_use: 需要在一个快照里展示多个项目、目标或本地工具任务的完成度与健康状态时用它，适合交付进展、迁移清单、测试覆盖和批处理状态；若重点是按时间排列里程碑，用 milestone-tracker，若要探索大量时间序列则用图表。
why_valuable: AI 常用一排百分比文本代替真正的进度视觉，状态和数值也容易脱节；本模板把条形/环形进度、原始值、展示值和 ✓正常／!风险／✗阻塞状态统一到响应式卡片网格中。

data_in.note: data.items 是进度指标数组。value 与 max 用于计算并夹取 0–100% 的视觉进度，max 省略或非正数时为 100；display 仅覆盖可见大数字，不改变计算。kind 为 'bar' 或 'ring'，默认 bar；status 为 'on-track'、'done'、'at-risk'、'blocked'，未知值按 on-track。

schema.title?: string —— 仪表板标题；省略时显示 “Progress dashboard”
schema.summary?: string —— 标题右侧的统计摘要；省略时显示指标数量
schema.items: {label:string,value:number,max?:number,display?:string,kind?:'bar'|'ring',status?:'on-track'|'done'|'at-risk'|'blocked',detail?:string}[] —— 每个进度卡；label 为名称，value/max 决定比例，display 为格式化展示，detail 为短说明

spec.note: 按卡片数量自动增高；卡片网格最小列宽 235px，520px 以下单列。无 vh/百分比高度，不依赖 ResizeObserver。

example._why: 五个发布指标混合 bar/ring 和四种状态，能验证百分比夹取、分数值、响应式网格及绿/琥珀/红状态语义。

items.label: Documentation
items.detail: API migration guide is still in review

uplink: 纯 display 组件，无 uplink；所有状态均由 data 决定，不向 AI 或宿主回传选择。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
